user_query: Child has some messy lunches that won't pack well for school - delete a few options that sounds hard to transport or eat cleanly.
nodes_to_delete: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Child > Day 3 > Lunch > Tuna Pasta Salad — Smoky Wrap
reasoning: Conservatively removed only the Tuna Pasta Salad because its preparation/serving suggestions (pasta salad in a bowl or spooned into a wrap) indicate it is more likely to be messy or hard to transport. Excluded Salmon Salad Wrap and Turkey Sandwich (both labeled 'portable' or 'grab-and-go') and excluded the Stuffed Bell Peppers entry because it's a dinner, not lunch. Caprese Sandwich appears packable and was not clearly identified as messy, so it was retained.
